summary: List Recycled Action Plan Template Sections
description: Returns all Recycled Action Plan Template Sections for a given company

parameters.name: filters[created_at]
parameters.description:
Return item(s) created within the specified ISO 8601 datetime range.
Formats:
`YYYY-MM-DD`...`YYYY-MM-DD` - Date
`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ`...`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ` - DateTime with UTC Offset
`YYYY-MM-...

parameters.name: filters[id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) with the specified IDs.

parameters.name: filters[plan_template_id]
parameters.description: Return section(s) associated with the specified Action Plan Template ID(s).

parameters.name: filters[updated_at]
parameters.description:
Return item(s) last updated within the specified ISO 8601 datetime range.
Formats:
`YYYY-MM-DD`...`YYYY-MM-DD` - Date
`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ`...`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ` - DateTime with UTC Offset
`YYY...

created_at.description: Time the Action Plan Template Section was created

deleted_at.description: Time the Action Plan Template Section was deleted

plan_template_id.description: Action Plan Template ID of the Action Plan Template Section

position.description: Postion of the Action Plan Template Section

title.description: Title of the Action Plan Template Section

updated_at.description: Time the Action Plan Template Section was updated
